Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[ defName="AEXP_Platypus" or defName="AEXP_Crocodile" or defName="AEXP_WildGoose" or defName="AEXP_Anaconda" or defName="AEXP_Rattlesnake" or defName="AEXP_GilaMonster" or defName="AEXP_DesertTortoise" ]/lifeStageAges/li/def[text()="AnimalBaby"]
